# zstack_aliyun_proxy_vpc (Resource)

Manage ZStack Aliyun Proxy VPC resources.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr_block` (String) The CIDR block of the Aliyun Proxy VPC.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default Aliyun Proxy VPC.
- `name` (String) The name of the Aliyun Proxy VPC.
- `vrouter_uuid` (String) The UUID of the Virtual Router.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Aliyun Proxy VPC.

### Read-Only

- `status` (String) The status of the Aliyun Proxy VPC.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the Aliyun Proxy VPC.
- `vpc_name` (String) The name of the VPC.
